title.source: Voting and Prioritization Methods for Enhanced Decision-Making
title.target: Voting and Prioritization Methods for Enhanced Decision-Making

description.source: A wide range of voting methods designed to facilitate a more inclusive, nuanced, and effective decision-making process.
description.target: A wide range of voting methods designed to facilitate a more inclusive, nuanced, and effective decision-making process.

body:0001.source: What is the voting and prioritization method?
body:0001.target: What is the voting and prioritization method?

body:0002.source: The platform offers a flexible voting and prioritization framework to support inclusive and nuanced decision-making.
body:0002.target: The platform offers a flexible voting and prioritization framework to support inclusive and nuanced decision-making.

body:0003.source: Admins can choose from multiple voting types:
body:0003.target: Admins can choose from multiple voting types:

body:0007.source: To gather community preferences in the most relevant way.
body:0007.target: To gather community preferences in the most relevant way.

body:0008.source: ℹ️ Voting and participatory budgeting games on our platform are by default anonymous, if you want more information on who voted contact the support team via the chat.
body:0008.target: ℹ️ Voting and participatory budgeting games on our platform are by default anonymous, if you want more information on who voted contact the support team via the chat.

body:0011.source: Click + New Idea in the voting phase.
body:0011.target: Click + New Idea in the voting phase.

body:0012.source: Fill out the input form (editable in the “Input Form” tab).
body:0012.target: Fill out the input form (editable in the “Input Form” tab).

body:0013.source: Option appears in the Input Manager and front office.
body:0013.target: Option appears in the Input Manager and front office.

body:0014.source: If options come from a previous phase:
body:0014.target: If options come from a previous phase:

body:0015.source: Open Input Manager in the previous ideation phase.
body:0015.target: Open Input Manager in the previous ideation phase.

body:0016.source: look for the blue bubble number below the input, click the number that represents the voting phase ahead to move items forward.
body:0016.target: look for the blue bubble number below the input, click the number that represents the voting phase ahead to move items forward.

body:0017.source: (Budgeting only) Add a cost to each option.
body:0017.target: (Budgeting only) Add a cost to each option.

body:0019.source: When you have a large amount of options to vote on, it might be useful to add a filter to your inputs. This filter applies to tags given to the inputs, so before enabling the filter make sure that all inputs have a tag assigned to them. You can read more about how to add tags in our support article here.
body:0019.target: When you have a large amount of options to vote on, it might be useful to add a filter to your inputs. This filter applies to tags given to the inputs, so before enabling the filter make sure that all inputs have a tag assigned to them. You can read more about how to add tags in our support article here.

body:0020.source: You can enable filtering in the Setup tab of your phase.
body:0020.target: You can enable filtering in the Setup tab of your phase.

body:0023.source: Participants cast a single vote for each option they support.
body:0023.target: Participants cast a single vote for each option they support.

body:0024.source: Promotes broad participation and reduces polarization.
body:0024.target: Promotes broad participation and reduces polarization.

body:0025.source: No strategic vote manipulation—simple, accessible, fair.
body:0025.target: No strategic vote manipulation—simple, accessible, fair.

body:0027.source: Participants get a budget of votes to allocate across multiple options
body:0027.target: Participants get a budget of votes to allocate across multiple options

body:0029.source: Optional: set a maximum votes per option to prevent “vote stacking” by small groups
body:0029.target: Optional: set a maximum votes per option to prevent “vote stacking” by small groups

body:0031.source: Participants allocate a budget across options with assigned costs/values.
body:0031.target: Participants allocate a budget across options with assigned costs/values.

body:0032.source: Encourages financial responsibility and trade-off thinking.
body:0032.target: Encourages financial responsibility and trade-off thinking.

body:0033.source: Can be displayed in a currency (e.g., €) or a custom unit (“tokens”) - ask the support team to change these for you.
body:0033.target: Can be displayed in a currency (e.g., €) or a custom unit (“tokens”) - ask the support team to change these for you.

body:0034.source: 💡 Tip: When running a participatory budgeting project, make sure every idea you include has a budget assigned. To add a budget to an idea:
body:0034.target: 💡 Tip: When running a participatory budgeting project, make sure every idea you include has a budget assigned. To add a budget to an idea:

body:0037.source: Click Edit, then Next until you reach the Budget field.
body:0037.target: Click Edit, then Next until you reach the Budget field.

body:0038.source: Enter the budget amount and save.
body:0038.target: Enter the budget amount and save.

body:0040.source: Users see clear voting instructions (cannot be edited).
body:0040.target: Users see clear voting instructions (cannot be edited).

body:0041.source: After voting ends, participants are directed to view results.
body:0041.target: After voting ends, participants are directed to view results.

body:0042.source: Admins can choose whether results are:
body:0042.target: Admins can choose whether results are:

body:0043.source: Automatically shared when voting ends, or
body:0043.target: Automatically shared when voting ends, or

body:0045.source: How to manage and monitor votes?
body:0045.target: How to manage and monitor votes?

body:0047.source: View votes in real time in the Input Manager.
body:0047.target: View votes in real time in the Input Manager.

body:0048.source: Online votes and offline votes appear in separate columns.
body:0048.target: Online votes and offline votes appear in separate columns.

body:0049.source: Only admins and project managers can monitor the votes in real-time.
body:0049.target: Only admins and project managers can monitor the votes in real-time.

body:0051.source: Go to Input Manager → select an option → manually enter offline votes.
body:0051.target: Go to Input Manager → select an option → manually enter offline votes.

body:0052.source: How to export and report on voting results?
body:0052.target: How to export and report on voting results?

body:0053.source: Export votes per user or votes per contribution via Input Manager.
body:0053.target: Export votes per user or votes per contribution via Input Manager.

body:0054.source: Results can be shared publicly or held for internal analysis. You can enable or disable automatic sharing of results in the 'Setup' of your Phase Settings by toggling the 'auto share results' toggle.
body:0054.target: Results can be shared publicly or held for internal analysis. You can enable or disable automatic sharing of results in the 'Setup' of your Phase Settings by toggling the 'auto share results' toggle.

body:0055.source: Voting phase automatically closes when its end date is reached (set in Phase Settings).
body:0055.target: Voting phase automatically closes when its end date is reached (set in Phase Settings).

body:0056.source: How to close the voting phase?
body:0056.target: How to close the voting phase?

body:0057.source: When the phase date ends, voting stops automatically.
body:0057.target: When the phase date ends, voting stops automatically.

body:0058.source: Results are shown based on the setting in Phase Settings.
body:0058.target: Results are shown based on the setting in Phase Settings.

body:0059.source: If results are not automatically shared, admins can manually release them later.
body:0059.target: If results are not automatically shared, admins can manually release them later.

body:0061.source: “Cast your vote” instructions or the “Submit" button cannot be edited.
body:0061.target: “Cast your vote” instructions or the “Submit" button cannot be edited.

body:0062.source: For budget voting, currency settings apply platform-wide (not per project).
body:0062.target: For budget voting, currency settings apply platform-wide (not per project).

body:0063.source: Encourage admins to test a voting phase early—phase must be active to test.
body:0063.target: Encourage admins to test a voting phase early—phase must be active to test.
